items.example: I love buying new gadgets for my kitchen.
The wheel is one of the most important inventions in history.
Technology has changed the way we communicate.
They came up with a low-tech solution to the problem.
Many villages still have no access to electricity.
Solar power is a clean and renewable source of energy.
The washing machine has saved people hours of hard work.
Vaccinations have saved millions of lives around the world.
Antibiotics are used to fight bacterial infections.
Some countries rely heavily on nuclear power for electricity.
The first commercial aeroplanes changed travel forever.
Communications satellites make global television possible.
